intentSynonyms: navigate a to business in yelp
open a business page in the browser in yelp
description: Navigate the browser to a specific Yelp business page by its URL alias. Opens the business detail page in the current tab.

alias.description: Business URL alias (e.g., "a-slice-of-new-york-san-jose"). Found in business URLs: yelp.com/biz/{alias}
